complaints.message:
SYNSET: Confirm object synset assignment.

Object assigned to synset: cabinet.n.01
Definition: a piece of furniture resembling a cupboard with doors and shelves and drawers; for storage or display

Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g., orange_juice.n.01 is the fluid orange juice and not a bottle).
For containers, note that usable containers (e.g. ones that have an open cap and
can be filled should be assigned to x__bottle.n.01 etc. synsets/categories while
non-usable containers should be assigned to bottle__of__x.n.01 etc. synsets/categories).

If the synset is wrong, please type in the name of the correct synset the object
should be assigned to. In the next question also type in the correct category.

ARTICULATION: Confirm articulation:
This object has the below movable links annotated:
- None

Verify that the joint limits look reasonable and that the object is not
missing articulations that would make it useless. Do NOT be overly ambitious - we
only care about MUST-HAVE articulations here.
